data.name: Live with Mary
data.detailed_description:
"Live with Mary" is a game where you play as a young man who is assigned to take care of his older sister's home. At the same time, a beautiful girl who seems to have some connection with his sister comes to stay with him. Her name is Mary.



This game is a 3D third-person exploration game where player can control a character to explore scenes and there is a 3D animated storyline with English voice-over.

Feature

You will develop a relationship with Mary by talking, buying gifts, cooking, and participating in various activities with her to improve your relationship level.

1. Exploring the house and collect some items
2. Cooking dinner for Mary
3. Playing mini games jigsaw puzzles to earn money to buy items.
4. Buy Mary some suitable gifts.
5. The gallery system collects pictures and videos that the player has found in the game.




The game will have multiple endings for you to discover, including an ending that you can expect with certainty. It all depends on your actions.

data.short_description: You play as Danny, who is assigned by his sister to run her home, and he has to live with a beautiful girl named Mary. You have 7 days to impress her to get the ending you want.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 泰文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 (3.1GHz) or AMD Phenom X4 945 (3.0GHz)
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 650 2GB or AMD Radeon HD 7770 2GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 3470, (3.20 Ghz) or AMD FX-8350, (4.00 Ghz)
  • 記憶體: 6 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 970 4GB or AMD Radeon R9 280X 3GB
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 16 GB 可用空間

data.supported_languages:
English*, Thai, Japanese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-2100 (3.1GHz) or AMD Phenom X4 945 (3.0GHz)
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 650 2GB or AMD Radeon HD 7770 2GB
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 16 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 3470, (3.20 Ghz) or AMD FX-8350, (4.00 Ghz)
  • Memory: 6 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 970 4GB or AMD Radeon R9 280X 3GB
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 16 GB available space
